title: Senior Software Engineer - Backend
score_reasoning: Your 7 years of distributed systems experience in Python and Go is strong, and Sigma's backend focus on microservices, APIs, and cloud infrastructure aligns well with your core strengths. However, this role has two critical blockers: (1) it explicitly requires on-site presence in New York City with no remote flexibility ('in-office work environment'), which directly conflicts with your remote-first location preference anchored to Berlin; (2) Rust and Kubernetes are listed as primary build languages/tools, and while Kubernetes is a known gap for you, the on-site NYC requirement is the dominant disqualifier. The senior title matches your trajectory, and the scale (high-growth, Series D company) aligns with your target industries, but the location constraint makes this role unworkable.

red_flags: On-site only in NYC — explicitly states 'in-office work environment in all our offices in SF, NYC, and London'
Kubernetes required — confirmed gap in your profile; no production K8s experience
Rust as primary language — not in your core stack (Python/Go focus); would require learning curve
US-based timezone (EST) — >5h mismatch from Berlin; no indication of async/global work culture
